div1.entryFree:
Enthralled, 1) deprived of liberty, captive: what though I be e.? H6A V, 3, 101.
2) reduced to the servitude of love, in love: my e. eyes, Gentl. II, 4, 134. being e. as I am, Wint. IV, 4, 234. With to: too high to be e. to low, Mids. I, 1, 136. so is mine eye e. to thy shape, III, 1, 142.
